tasks.instruction: Using the online utility payment system as a guest (without logging in), make a one-time credit or debit card payment for the full balance of any water bill with a total due between $50 and $100, entering the payer name as “Alex Rivera.”

tasks.instruction: Submit a street and sidewalk pothole service request for the intersection of Pine Street and 4th Avenue, marked as non-emergency, including a brief description of the issue and your contact name and email.

expected_values.description: Large pothole in the right lane heading north, about 10 feet before the crosswalk.

tasks.instruction: From the list of City Council meetings held in the previous calendar month, find a meeting whose agenda relates to zoning, open its agenda, and then save that meeting to your favorites or watchlist with the note “Zoning agenda review.”

tasks.instruction: Submit an online bulk trash pickup request for three furniture items, choosing the earliest available Saturday that is at least 7 days from today as the pickup date and providing your service address and curbside pickup notes.

expected_values.notes: Please pick up items from the curb next to the driveway.
